achievements: Deployed Project Zomboid game server — full GitOps setup (namespace, PVC, deployment, service, externalsecret, configmap), then migrated to indifferentbroccoli image with improved config (#1168)
Built solar MPPT monitoring pipeline — Epever RS485 monitor on RPi4 (192.168.10.174) with Docker, Prometheus scrape endpoint (:9812), and Grafana dashboard ConfigMap
Created custom llama.cpp CUDA 12.8 image build pipeline in CI (.github/workflows/llama-cpp-build.yml) and updated deployment to v8665
Fixed ArgoCD Job immutability bug — added hook annotations to prevent 'field is immutable' sync failures on image tag bumps
CI hardening — fixed kubeconform YAML doc filtering and shellcheck issues
Renovate processed ~20 dependency updates (kube-prometheus-stack, CNPG, Temporal, OTEL operator, Jellyfin, SearXNG, etc.)
improvements: Commit the uncommitted solar monitoring changes (solar-dashboard.yaml, kustomization.yaml, values.yaml) — these are live in working tree but not pushed
Project Zomboid deployment had 14+ iterations on deployment.yaml across sessions — consider templating or documenting the container config requirements to avoid churn on future game servers
Solar monitor uses raw Docker on RPi4 outside GitOps — consider adding it to a separate repo or documenting the deployment in docs/ for reproducibility
ArgoCD reconciliation was reduced to default 180s (8cecaf5e) — monitor whether this causes excessive Git polling or is optimal
next_tasks: Commit and push the solar dashboard + Prometheus scrape config changes (3 files modified in monitoring/prometheus-stack/)
Debug MPPT physical connection — memory notes 'MPPT not responding (physical issue)'; verify RS485 wiring and Exar adapter on RPi4
Add Prometheus alerts for solar metrics (battery voltage low, charge controller offline, panel power anomalies)
Verify Project Zomboid server is stable after the indifferentbroccoli image migration — check pod logs and player connectivity
Review Renovate PRs for any that need manual intervention (large version bumps like Node.js v24 #1141)
risks: Uncommitted monitoring changes (3 files) could be lost — solar-dashboard.yaml, kustomization.yaml edits, values.yaml scrape config are only in working tree
Solar MPPT RS485 communication failure flagged as physical issue — monitor may be collecting no data, making the dashboard empty
Node.js v24 update (#1141) is a major version bump — could break astro build or any JS tooling in the repo
Three ArgoCD Helm chart versions retained (8.6.4, 9.0.5, 9.1.0) — 780k+ tokens of templates; old chart directories should be pruned after confirming 9.1.0 is stable
